creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
astro/stellarium built by yours truly using ports-mgmt/synth on fairly recent current, crashes at startup:

Cannot mix incompatible Qt library (5.15.7) with this library (5.15.8)
Abort trap (core dumped)

All my Qt 5 packages are mostly at 5.15.8, two are at 5.15.11, none are at 5.15.7.

Stellarium is configured this way:

Options        :
        DOCS           : on
        GPS            : on
        MORE_STARS     : off
        MULTIMEDIA     : on
        NLS            : off
        SCRIPTS        : on
        SHOWMYSKY      : on
        TELESCOPE      : on
        TEST           : off
        TEXTURES       : on
        WEBENGINE      : on
        XLSX           : on

Stellarium has these dependencies:

Depends on     :
        qt5-widgets-5.15.8p157
        qt5-gui-5.15.8p157
        qt5-declarative-5.15.8p21
        qt5-charts-5.15.8p0
        qt5-webengine-5.15.8
        qt5-webchannel-5.15.8p3
        qt5-printsupport-5.15.8p157
        qt5-network-5.15.8p157
        qt5-multimedia-5.15.8p1
        shared-mime-info-2.2_1
        qt5-opengl-5.15.8p157
        qxlsx-1.4.4
        qt5-script-5.15.11p0
        qt5-location-5.15.8p3
        qt5-core-5.15.8p157
        qt5-concurrent-5.15.8p157
        desktop-file-utils-0.26_1
        qt5-serialport-5.15.8p0
        gpsd-3.23.1_1
        calcmysky-0.2.1

These are the installed Qt 5 packages:
